hosting.//: Headers placed here under hosting.headers — Firebase Hosting reliably applies these. App Hosting (SSR) traffic should mirror via custom server config if needed, but static asset & top-level header rules belong here.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://app.cal.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https: ; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://github-contributions-api.deno.dev https://www.google-analytics.com https://app.cal.com; frame-src https://app.cal.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
